catalyst: Central-bank buying and rate-cut hopes drive bullion records, lifting miners.

entries.exit_advice: Exit if central-bank buying slows or rate-cut expectations fade, leading to a material correction in gold prices.
entries.assessment: Gold miners (GDX) are breaking out as bullion records are set, driven by central-bank demand and rate-cut hopes. Miners lag the metal, indicating potential catch-up.
entries.news_claims: GDX breaking out as bullion hits records on central-bank buying and rate-cut hopes; miners lag the metal with room to rise.

entries.exit_advice: Exit if central-bank buying slows or rate-cut expectations fade, leading to a material correction in gold prices.
entries.assessment: No fresh news this week; thesis remains intact with gold miners supported by central-bank buying and rate-cut hopes. Miners continue to lag bullion, suggesting catch-up potential, but momentum may depend on ongoing catalysts.

entries.exit_advice: Exit if central-bank buying slows or rate-cut expectations fade, leading to a material correction in gold prices.
entries.assessment: No fresh developments this week; thesis remains active with gold supported by central-bank buying and rate-cut hopes. Miners continue to lag bullion, suggesting potential for catch-up, but watch for changes in catalysts.
